blended.narrative: Indianhead Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.4 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,194 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
